creator: skv@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, but: 

1. Please, always make "cvs up" before patching port. 

2. There are no needs to add "UsingPerl6-draft.pdf" and "cheatsheet.txt" 
because of they are added by relevant lines in "Makefile": 

EXTRA_DOCS=     UsingPerl6-draft.pdf cheatsheet.txt 
PORTDOCS=       ${EXTRA_DOCS}
